title: sourcing map 5mm x 40mm Phillips Pan Head Self-tapping Screw, 50pcs - 304 Stainless Steel Round Head Wood Screw Full Thread (Black)
features: [Basic Size] - The Phillips Pan Head Self-tapping Screw is a highly functional fastener that a thread diameter of 5mm, a Screw length of 40mm, a head diameter of 9mm, and a head thickness of 2.8mm.

[Good Material] - Made of good quality 304 stainless steel, these screws are rust-resistant, durable, and can withstand harsh environments or exposure to moisture without corroding. This ensures optimal durability and longevity, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor applications.

[Design] - The pan head design of these screws provides a flat surface that is flush with the material they are screwed into, which provides greater support and stability. The screw's pan head shape provides a smooth surface finish, enhancing the overall aesthetic of the project.

[Easy to Use] - These Phillips Pan Head Self-tapping Screws are easy to use, requiring only a screwdriver to install. The screw's pointed tail can be through in sheet metal, wood, or plastic materials, making them versatile and adaptable.

[Application] - These Phillips Pan Head Self-tapping Screws are commonly used in automotive, industrial, construction, electronics assembly, machinery manufacturing, furniture production, and automotive repair and electrical industries due to their strength, reliability, and durability.
